series_metadata.series_description: These forms (Coupon and Delivery Verification Receipt) contain information which allows a program participant to purchase designated food items. Each form includes the following information: Participant's name, address and signature; Vendor's name, address, and tax identification number; amount of sale; authorized food items, quantity; and redeemable dates.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: records at ODH Warehouse verify receipt verification, ; records audited and/or three years six months, whichever is longer
